name: X Engagement Receipt Agent
description: Creates receipt trails for accepted engagement proof with campaign ID, action type, submitted URL/hash, reviewer decision, reward amount, and timestamp.
degenPitch: The proof trail for accepted campaign work.
whatItDoes: Creates compliant campaign or proof-review workflow.
Requires human approval and platform-rule compliance.
Uses receipt-gated rewards after proof review.
cursorPrompt: Build a X Engagement Receipt Agent using DNA x402. Create a human-reviewed proof workflow, require proof URL or hash and timestamp, issue a receipt only after proof acceptance, never auto-post, never spam, and never use fake accounts.
suggestedPrompt: Build a X Engagement Receipt Agent using DNA x402. Create a human-reviewed proof workflow, require proof URL or hash and timestamp, issue a receipt only after proof acceptance, never auto-post, never spam, and never use fake accounts.
